features.title: AI First Curriculum
features.desc: Every course integrates AI tools and concepts from semester one. Build AI-powered projects that solve real problems.

features.title: Coding from Day One
features.desc: No theory overload. 70% hands-on coding with industry-standard tools and practices from the start.

features.title: Learn from Industry experts
features.desc: Learn from engineers at Google, Microsoft, and Amazon. Real insights, real experience, real connections.

features.title: Campus Built for Techies
features.desc: AI-powered smart classrooms, 24/7 coding labs, high-speed internet. Spaces designed for innovation.

features.title: Career Launch Ecosystem
features.desc: 250+ hiring partners, resume workshops, mock interviews. Your career journey starts from year one.

features.title: Selective Peer Group
features.desc: Rigorous CPUEST selection ensures you learn alongside motivated, talented future tech leaders.

curriculum.title: The Curriculum
curriculum.description: 8 semesters of hands-on learning. Designed by AI researchers. Updated annually.

data.title: AI Foundations
data.subtitle: Building future AI experts from first principles. Exploring the math, code, and thinking behind an AI-first world.

subjects.name: Mathematical Thinking for AI & Computer Science
Programming Foundations for AI Builders | Python

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.description: Class 10+2 with PCM and 50%+ marks. Admission via CPUEST and personal interview. Top 20–25% of applicants are selected.

timelineSteps.title: Register & Apply Online
timelineSteps.desc: Submit application with 10+2 marksheet and PCM details.
timelineSteps.label: Opens March 2025

timelineSteps.title: Appear for CPUEST
timelineSteps.desc: Career Point Scholastic Aptitude Test — Maths, English & Aptitude. Online and on-campus at Kota.
timelineSteps.label: March 28, 2026

timelineSteps.title: Personal Interview
timelineSteps.desc: Faculty panel interview — tests problem-solving ability and passion for building with technology.

timelineSteps.title: Counselling & Seat Confirmation
timelineSteps.desc: One-on-one counselling session. Submit documents and confirm your seat with the confirmation fee.
timelineSteps.label: Batch begins July 2026

placements.title: Placement Ecosystem
placements.subtitle: Your career journey starts from Day 1 — not in the final year

pillars.title: Semester Assessments
pillars.desc: Regular evaluations every semester to track your technical growth.

pillars.title: Coding Profile Tracking
pillars.desc: We monitor your LeetCode & Codeforces to ensure consistent practice.

pillars.title: GitHub Project Tracking
pillars.desc: Your projects are tracked on GitHub to build a recruiter-ready profile.

pillars.title: MAANG Ready
pillars.desc: DSA bootcamps, mock interviews, and resume building workshops.

comparison.title: CPU Curated vs Traditional College Experience
comparison.subtitle: Why is CPU Curated experience better than traditional colleges?

data.label: Internships & Jobs
data.cpu: Programme designed to make you internship-ready by Year 2 - backed by 250+ hiring partners.
data.other: <25% students receive an internship by their 3rd year

data.label: AI Tools & Learning
data.cpu: 12+ AI tools used in real projects from Semester 1 - ChatGPT, OpenAI API, LangChain, TensorFlow & more
data.other: AI introduced only in Year 3–4 as a late elective, rarely applied to real projects

data.label: Career Prep Start
data.cpu: LeetCode, GitHub tracking, DSA bootcamps & mock interviews from Week 1, Year 1
data.other: Placements and interview prep typically begin only in Year 3–4

data.label: Projects & Portfolio
data.cpu: 15 portfolio-grade, deployed projects shipped across 4 years - recruiter-ready GitHub
data.other: 1–2 final-year projects, rarely deployed or production-grade

data.label: Faculties & Curriculum
data.cpu: Industry-relevant curriculum built and taught by experts from Google & Amazon
data.other: Rarely updated curriculum, mostly academic-only faculty

data.label: Curriculum
data.cpu: Start coding and build real projects from Day 1
data.other: Build real world projects only by the end of 3rd–4th year

data.label: Entrepreneurship
data.cpu: ₹1 Cr StartX fund, expert mentors, coding events, GSOC, ICPC
data.other: Good startup culture but mostly without funding support

data.label: Industry Exposure
data.cpu: Frequent sessions with tech leaders, CTOs, VCs and startup founders
data.other: Industry exposure limited to top students only
